INTER-OFFICE MEMO

PO: Frank Carrino

FROM: Donald S. allen, Chairman DATE, 9/26/61 " Department of Chemistry

The Eastern New York Section of the American Chemical Society will hold its November meeting at the college on the i ; 15th in 349 Draper at 8 p.m.

— The Speaker will be Dr. Leallyn Clapp, Professor of Chemistry, Brown University. His topic - ''New Develop- ments in High School Chemistry." High School Chemistry Teacher awards will be made on this occasion.

Vv

Dr. Glapp is a text book author, and a member of the Board of Directors on the Chemical Bond Approach (one of the two major High School chemistry programs subsidized by the National Science Foundatio He has also served as Chair- man of the Division of the Chemical Education of A. C. S.

#400

rank
